text: If OWNER assesses a Deductible Obligation against Contractor, then that Deductible Obligation shall be due and payable to OWNER within ten (10) days after OWNER's written demand. The parties agree that the Deductible Obligation is a contract obligation, and not a tort liability, regardless of the nature of the claim for which the OWNER incurred the deductible. Contractor shall not seek insurance coverage for the Deductible Obligation under any other OWNER provided insurance. OWNER may back-charge Contractor, may withhold from monies otherwise owing to Contractor or may collect by any other lawful means, the amount(s) owed by Contractor as its Deductible Obligation. The obligations of Contractor are not limited in any manner because of any coverage provided by OWNER.
